Yeah, this is my third call in three days because my internet’s been down the whole time. I work from home, I’ve got a deadline tomorrow, and I’m starting to think your outage map is just a piece of modern art.

I’ve been calm for three days; it’s starting to feel like a lifestyle choice at this point. Fine—walk me through the process, but make it the version that doesn’t leave me without internet until next week.
